title: SuperForm Masterclass is now available on demand

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Last week we hosted a SuperForm Masterclass featuring 3 practical use cases and a focus on SuperForm’s standout features, including:

  • how to use subitems in forms (update and insert)
  • how to fetch data from other boards to be used in your forms (connect and mirror columns)
  • advanced form logic
  • custom form design

For those who missed it, here’s the recap - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t-efSGgp1V0&t=469s

Open your monday.com boards and follow along as our host Michal Leiba demonstrates how to set up advanced features in just a few clicks.

If you have any questions, comments, or requests for our next webinar, leave them below!
